project: Petoskey Pit amphitheatre — Open Civic Bowl (in-situ package)

design_of_record.scenario: Scenario E three-section civic bowl (east/bend/south) on the Scenario D restored baseline
design_of_record.status: seating / ADA / drainage cost-proxy ACCEPTED · stage refit OPEN (Rule 9)

crs.horizontal: EPSG:6494 NAD83(2011) / Michigan Central, INTERNATIONAL feet

seating.rows_absent_reason: row 5 = promenades; rows 9/10 reclassified as the accessible cross-aisle

stage.kind: low hardscape deck + shoulders (open to bay side, no upstage wall — landscape venue)
stage.status: PROVISIONAL — Rule 9 OPEN; no adoption path declared

ada_route.kind: two switchback routes (A: rim→floor; B: rim→cross-aisle) + 5 landings

cross_aisle.kind: rows 9/10 reclassified as level accessible cross-aisle

drainage.kind: east + south flank swales falling to the treatment cell

treatment_cell.kind: dry ephemeral bioretention landscape (natural bowl bottom)
treatment_cell.shaping: concept tier — schematic 4:1, down-only, never impounds permanent water

bay_view_axis.note: NNW toward Little Traverse Bay / evening sun

event_floor.kind: orchestra/event floor between stage and row 1

options.label: Scenario E baseline

options.recommended_posture: Fallback regardless of the decision; choose if no further earthwork is wanted

warnings: PLANNING-GRADE ONLY — derived from 2015 USGS LiDAR + supplement; not a stamped engineering design and not a field survey.
Stage deck is PROVISIONAL: DESIGN_CANON.md Rule 9 is OPEN (inherited az-150 stage; +25.6° audience-axis mismatch on record).
Coordinates are EPSG:6494 INTERNATIONAL feet — misreading as US survey feet shifts absolute easting ~39 ft (docs/datum_note.md).
Component CY totals are validated proxies that understate mobilization-level earthwork (analysis/tier_emission/TIER_EMISSION_VALIDATION.md).
Seating scope Decision 1 is pending; this package shows the Scenario E baseline (option A).
Treatment-cell shaping and orchestra/event floor are concept-tier (illustrative), not geometry-backed.
missing_data: Full ADA/code compliance (built cross-slopes, handrails, clearances)
